About.title: About Company
About.description: Urpha Capital was founded in 2023 to increase financial literacy and expand investment opportunities. Our specialists help clients analyze the market and manage their assets.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Protecting your investments is our priority and primary goal.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: We apply maximum precision and a professional algorithmic approach in market analysis.

speed.title: Speed
speed.desc: Executing signals and trading operations in seconds using the most advanced technologies.

literacy.title: Financial Literacy
literacy.description: Take your first steps in the world of finance and learn how to manage your savings correctly.

courses.title: Online & Offline Courses
courses.description: Learn the basics of trading and investment from experienced traders.

copytrading.title: Investment / Copy Trading
copytrading.description: Automatically copy the strategies of professional traders to your account.

Benefits.title: Why Choose Urpha Capital?
Benefits.description: With us, you not only gain knowledge but also open a reliable gateway to the professional financial world.

certificates.label: Certificates
certificates.desc: Our graduates are awarded international certificates of achievement.

practice.label: Live Practice
practice.desc: You learn trading on real market charts and in actual practice.

support.label: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Our specialists are ready to answer any of your questions at any time.

knowledge.label: Guaranteed Knowledge
knowledge.desc: You will be taught proven strategies that deliver real results.

mentorship.label: Mentorship

technology.label: Latest Technologies

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Detailed answers to all the questions you are interested in.

q1.q: Who are Urpha Capital courses for?
q1.a: Our courses are uniquely optimized for both beginners and experienced traders. You can systematically study everything: from financial literacy to complex algorithmic trading strategies.

q2.q: How does the copy trading service work?
q2.a: Through copy trading, you link your account to the reliable master accounts of our professional traders. All profitable trades they make are automatically repeated on your account with millisecond precision.

q3.a: Yes, we have organized offline classes in our modern office in the center of Tashkent. In offline courses, you will have the opportunity to communicate directly with professional traders.

q4.q: Is there an option to pay in installments?
q4.a: Certainly, for the convenience of our students, we provide the option to pay for the course in 2 or 3 parts (installments). This allows you to get quality knowledge without financial pressure.

q5.q: Is a certificate issued upon completion of the course?
q5.a: Yes, all our course graduates are awarded a special Urpha Capital digital and physical certificate with a QR code and stamp for successful completion of the training.

Contact.title: A Step Towards Financial Success
Contact.description: Fill out the form below to connect with mentors or sign up for classes. We will answer your questions within 24 hours.
